assistant_rules: Answer only from retrieved Bastian knowledge chunks.
Never fabricate information. If information is not present in context, say so clearly.
Never invent prices, availability, booking links, payment links, inventory, discounts, reservations, policies, facilities, menu items, or services.
If information is not found, respond with the information_not_found refusal template.
Suggest contacting Bastian staff for reservations, payment, or availability inquiries.
Use negative knowledge list to identify out-of-scope topics.
Every answer must include citations to source documents.

venue_information.name: Bastian Beach Club Venue Information
venue_information.description: Static venue details, location, description, founders, architect, size, capacity, event spaces, accessibility, parking, policies.

reservation_policy.name: Reservation Policy
reservation_policy.description: Reservation requirements, booking channels, deposit, cancellation, modification, late arrival, no-show, seating preferences.

entry_and_cover_charge.name: Entry and Cover Charge Policy
entry_and_cover_charge.description: Age restriction, ID requirements, cover charges, pool access, dress code, entry checks, refusal rights.

child_and_family_policy.name: Child and Family Policy
child_and_family_policy.description: Daytime child policy, evening age restriction, kids activities, kids menu.

pet_policy.name: Pet Policy
pet_policy.description: Pet restrictions, service animal exceptions, penalty for unauthorised pets.

smoking_policy.name: Smoking Policy
smoking_policy.description: Indoor smoking prohibition, designated outdoor area, fine.

photography_policy.name: Photography and Drone Policy
photography_policy.description: Personal photography allowance, professional photography permission, drone prohibition.

parking_policy.name: Parking Policy
parking_policy.description: Valet parking, self-parking, EV charging availability.

accessibility_policy.name: Accessibility Policy
accessibility_policy.description: Wheelchair access, ramps, accessible restrooms, accessible parking.

payment_policy.name: Payment Policy
payment_policy.description: Accepted payment methods, foreign currency, split bill, GST, service charge, gift cards, refunds.

pool_policy.name: Pool Policy
pool_policy.description: Access fee, hours, rules, swimwear, children supervision, lockers, showers.

wellness_policy.name: Wellness Policy
wellness_policy.description: Wellness offerings, yoga schedule, seasonal timing, registration requirement.

food_menu.name: Bastian Food Menu
food_menu.description: Starters, sushi, small plates, main courses, desserts, kids menu, dietary options.

beverage_menu.name: Bastian Beverage Menu
beverage_menu.description: Cocktails, mocktails, wine, champagne, spirits, beer, tea, coffee, fresh juices.

signature_dishes.name: Signature Dishes
signature_dishes.description: List of signature dishes and their descriptions.

weekly_events.name: Weekly Events Schedule
weekly_events.description: Weekly recurring events including DJ nights, brunches, sunset sessions, Arcane Affair.

seasonal_events.name: Seasonal Events
seasonal_events.description: Seasonal events like New Year's Eve Gala, Christmas Brunch.

event_spaces.name: Event Spaces
event_spaces.description: Spaces available for private events, corporate events, weddings, and parties.

nightlife_policy.name: Nightlife and Club Policy
nightlife_policy.description: DJ sessions, VIP tables, bottle service, minimum spend, security checks, prohibited substances.

operational_timings.name: Operational Timings
operational_timings.description: Operating days, hours, sunset slot, party slot, pool hours, wellness hours.

venue_history.name: Venue History
venue_history.description: Founders, architect, design inspiration, brand evolution.

venue_highlights.name: Bastian Beach Club
venue_highlights.address: 39, Sun-n-Sand, Juhu Beach, Juhu, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400049
venue_highlights.description: Mumbai's first all-day beach club. Overlooks Arabian Sea. Designed by Minal Chopra. Open layouts, central pool. Daytime: lounging, brunch, wellness. Evening: sundowners, live DJs, nightlife.

dynamic_info_notes.cover_charge: Subject to change for special events. Check event listings or contact venue.
dynamic_info_notes.holiday_timings: Varies during public holidays. Contact venue.
dynamic_info_notes.events_calendar: Contact venue or check social media.
dynamic_info_notes.minimum_spend: Varies by package, day, and demand. Contact reservations.

negative_knowledge: Future promotional rates or discounts are not stored.
Live booking status is not stored.
Guest personal data is not stored.
Future pricing or dynamic pricing is not stored.
The assistant cannot create, modify, cancel, confirm, or manage reservations.
The assistant has no access to live booking systems, reservation databases, guest records, payment systems, or operational dashboards.

refusal_templates.information_not_found: I couldn't find that information in the Bastian knowledge base. Please contact Bastian staff at +91 2250 333555 or resmanager@bastianhospitality.com.
refusal_templates.availability_unknown: Table availability is not available. Please contact reservations at +91 2250 333555.
refusal_templates.pricing_unknown: I couldn't locate pricing information for that request.
refusal_templates.reservation_action_not_supported: I cannot create, modify, cancel, confirm, or manage reservations. Please contact reservations at +91 2250 333555.
refusal_templates.inventory_unavailable: Real-time inventory and availability are not stored.
refusal_templates.live_data_unavailable: I do not have access to live Bastian systems or operational databases.
refusal_templates.low_confidence: I'm not confident enough to answer that question based on the available information. Please contact Bastian staff for assistance.

answer_validation_rules: Every factual statement must be supported by retrieved chunks.
Do not answer if supporting context is missing.
Do not infer values, estimate prices, or create policies not present in context.
If retrieval confidence is below threshold, refuse.
If retrieved chunks contradict each other, refuse.
Never generate booking confirmation numbers or payment URLs.
Every factual statement must be traceable to retrieved context.
Every answer must include at least one citation.
Pricing answers must cite pricing documents.
Reservation answers must cite reservation policy documents.
Event answers must cite event documents.
Menu answers must cite menu documents.
